“ And that , ”
“ I have heard much of your master ’s fine person , ”
“ it is a handsome face . But , Lizzy , you can tell us whether it is like or not . ”

quotes.quote_text: “ Does that young lady know Mr. Darcy ? ”

context.quote_text: “ I have heard much of your master ’s fine person , ”
“ it is a handsome face . But , Lizzy , you can tell us whether it is like or not . ”
“ A little . ”
“ And do not you think him a very handsome gentleman , ma’am ? ”

quotes.quote_text: “ Oh , yes -- the handsomest young lady that ever was seen ; and so accomplished ! She plays and sings all day long . In the next room is a new instrument just come down for her -- a present from my master : she comes here to - morrow with him . ”

context.quote_text: “ I am sure _ I _ know none so handsome ; but in the gallery upstairs you will see a finer , larger picture of him than this . This room was my late master ’s favourite room , and these miniatures are just as they used to be then . He was very fond of them . ”
“ And is Miss Darcy as handsome as her brother ? ”
“ Is your master much at Pemberley in the course of the year ? ”
“ Not so much as I could wish , sir : but I dare say he may spend half his time here ; and Miss Darcy is always down for the summer months . ”

quotes.quote_text: “ Is your master much at Pemberley in the course of the year ? ”

quotes.quote_text: “ Not so much as I could wish , sir : but I dare say he may spend half his time here ; and Miss Darcy is always down for the summer months . ”

context.quote_text: “ Oh , yes -- the handsomest young lady that ever was seen ; and so accomplished ! She plays and sings all day long . In the next room is a new instrument just come down for her -- a present from my master : she comes here to - morrow with him . ”
“ Is your master much at Pemberley in the course of the year ? ”
“ Except , ”
“ when she goes to Ramsgate . ”

quotes.quote_text: “ If your master would marry , you might see more of him . ”

context.quote_text: “ Except , ”
“ when she goes to Ramsgate . ”
“ Yes , sir ; but I do not know when _ that _ will be . I do not know who is good enough for him . ”
“ It is very much to his credit , I am sure , that you should think so . ”

quotes.quote_text: “ He is the best landlord , and the best master , ”

context.quote_text: “ His father was an excellent man , ”
“ Yes , ma’am , that he was indeed ; and his son will be just like him -- just as affable to the poor . ”

“ that ever lived . Not like the wild young men now - a - days , who think of nothing but themselves . There is not one of his tenants or servants but what will give him a good name . Some people call him proud ; but I am sure I never saw anything of it . To my fancy , it is only because he does not rattle away like other young men . ”
“ In what an amiable light does this place him ! ”

“ He is the best landlord , and the best master , ”
“ In what an amiable light does this place him ! ”
“ This fine account of him , ”
“ This fine account of him , ”
“ is not quite consistent with his behaviour to our poor friend . ”
“ That is not very likely ; our authority was too good . ”
“ He is certainly a good brother , ”
